189129.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
189129.transcript: I've had enough of your evil machinations!

1676030.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
1676030.transcript: You're as strong as I feared.

4667221.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
4667221.transcript: I'm here to protect the crew.

22686800.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
22686800.transcript: Just don't call me Mother Nature.

26651517.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
26651517.transcript: Let us finish this! For the skies!

26972313.label: PL0600_vo_ETC_quest_start_1
26972313.transcript: Let's sow the seeds of adventure.

29097541.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
29097541.transcript: The passion of youth is intoxicating.

38792909.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
38792909.transcript: Sink into a bed of crimson roses!

42410063.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_1
42410063.transcript: Caution before valor, as they say.

43375679.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
43375679.transcript: This cold air is murder on my skin.

51146721.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_overdrive
51146721.transcript: Then we won't take this lightly.

59214144.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
59214144.transcript: Nothing sharpens my thorns like a girl with some skill.

63965201.label: PL0600_vo_ETC_quest_clear_6
63965201.transcript: And just where are you looking?

64007584.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
64007584.transcript: I must say, I do prefer my companions hulking.

64845555.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
64845555.transcript: You're going to come home to us, Id!

86464244.label: PL0600_vo_NAV_throw_default_reaction_2
86464244.transcript: That's what you get for testing me.

95689885.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
95689885.transcript: We're not out of the briars yet.

105436898.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
105436898.transcript: Ever since we arrived in this skydome, something has felt off.

119136883.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
119136883.transcript: Well, this place won't explore itself.

121442714.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
121442714.transcript: My gorgeous blossom, you already are.

126559285.label: PL0600_vo_ETC_pic_line_1
126559285.transcript: I'll make good use of you.

130448404.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
130448404.transcript: We've placed a lot of trust in you, Rolan.

132658434.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
132658434.transcript: All of these pests buzzing around our garden.

132695262.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
132695262.transcript: Press on. The peak should be near enough.

138801226.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
138801226.transcript: Be a good boy and run home to mommy, Id.

140219789.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
140219789.transcript: A funeral rose should do the trick.

144798599.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
144798599.transcript: You have the upper hand no longer!

145126488.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
145126488.transcript: Ooh, does this mean you're in my debt?

145266764.label: PL0600_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL0400_3
145266764.transcript: We need to get you healed!

149379664.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
149379664.transcript: You're a kind one, aren't you?

159857022.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
159857022.transcript: Let me show you how to really tango!

159886941.label: PL0600_vo_ETC_lift_stay_line_2
159886941.transcript: Really? You're making me do this?

160268099.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
160268099.transcript: As I would expect no less from the Founder of Alchemy.

162034777.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
162034777.transcript: We're more like beauties in battle.

183388818.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
183388818.transcript: I don't know about you, but my petals are wilting.

198618514.label: PL0600_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_4
198618514.transcript: Did you think I'd lay down and wither?

198878453.label: PL0600_vo_DUO_rescue1_A_2
198878453.transcript: You've still got work to do!

199980807.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
199980807.transcript: Elegance is all about consistency, dear.

206693031.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
206693031.transcript: We will stop you! No matter what!

208682232.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
208682232.transcript: Id, I know you can hear us!

214154577.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
214154577.transcript: I'm awfully curious. How about showing us what's under that helmet?

217719877.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
217719877.transcript: We were pretty well matched there.

220684439.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
220684439.transcript: Watch the sugar, dear. I'm on a diet.

223378959.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
223378959.transcript: Sure... but I don't belong to them anymore.

230925748.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
230925748.transcript: Defeat is going to look good on you.

232576245.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
232576245.transcript: It's nice having you close by.

243411465.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0900
243411465.transcript: It was a pleasure dancing with you.

246110027.label: PL0600_vo_CMM_emo_pose_5
246110027.transcript: Ever seen a rose in full bloom?

254641405.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
254641405.transcript: Ferry, be a dear and assist me again.

255405327.label: PL0600_vo_CMM_emo_win_1
255405327.transcript: Welcome to my garden. You may never leave.

255492367.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
255492367.transcript: Red is the color of passion, and you are quite vivid.

260791676.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0500
260791676.transcript: You never let me down, Eugen.

268453951.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1200
268453951.transcript: I can always trust in your steady blade.

270742839.label: PL0600_vo_NAV_enemy_break_reaction_B
270742839.transcript: I'm going to make this hurt so good.

270984599.label: PL0600_vo_SP_charge_speak_1
270984599.transcript: Sleep on a bed of thorns!

275150563.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
275150563.transcript: Was that an inferno or were you just happy to see me?

281290835.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
281290835.transcript: You understand the way of the flower.

288132566.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0000
288132566.transcript: Anything to keep you safe and sound.

291674847.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_C
291674847.transcript: Careful. One false step could spell disaster.

294940272.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
294940272.transcript: To grow a beautiful garden, you need to cull a few weeds.

297140272.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
297140272.transcript: Unfortunately for you, we have nothing left to fear.

297800717.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
297800717.transcript: Love a man who knows what he wants.

297967455.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
297967455.transcript: I knew we were being watched in Seedhollow.

301049723.label: PL0600_vo_ATK_default_line_l_rose_area_3
301049723.transcript: Perhaps this will do the trick.

305673788.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
305673788.transcript: Sorry boys, this is going to hurt.

306514826.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
306514826.transcript: Is there anything we can't do?

307850575.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
307850575.transcript: That shot was to die for!

308029812.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
308029812.transcript: Love the energy, even if it is a little scary.

316568366.label: PL0600_vo_DUO_rescue1_B_PL0400
316568366.transcript: Can you try a little harder for me?

336503206.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
336503206.transcript: Stay focused! There's no foe we can't overcome!

336956647.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
336956647.transcript: I... I can feel reality itself warping.

339357407.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
339357407.transcript: I do love a lady knight.

340445730.label: PL0600_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL0400
340445730.transcript: What would I do without you?

341151813.label: PL0600_vo_CMM_emo_win_4
341151813.transcript: Do you find me alluring? Now you know better.

343217239.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
343217239.transcript: Victory lies before us! Seize it!

343768451.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
343768451.transcript: Behold the glory of true teamwork!

353066588.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
353066588.transcript: Not only am I gorgeous, I'm tenacious too!

356867628.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
356867628.transcript: Sorry. Your flames, they brought me back to a dark place.

360220915.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
360220915.transcript: So, she loves a spectacle. Then let's give her a show.

362684379.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_C
362684379.transcript: My, we've certainly made a stir, haven't we?

363978489.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
363978489.transcript: She buzzes around like a fly. Let's swat her.

373167310.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
373167310.transcript: This is no time to hesitate!

376760300.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
376760300.transcript: Sorry dear, I don't work well with flames.

380193998.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
380193998.transcript: You would do well not to underestimate us.

383671884.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
383671884.transcript: What a dreadful place. Let's not stick around here long.

383949447.label: PL0600_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_PL0400_3
383949447.transcript: Thank you, my little ray of sunshine.

402108635.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
402108635.transcript: Id, I appreciate the passion, but let's not get carried away.

402508225.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
402508225.transcript: Rose and butterfly, the perfect combination.

407372149.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
407372149.transcript: If I could sneak thorns into their circuitry...

413341730.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
413341730.transcript: It's the perfect weapon for both love and war.

418247742.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
418247742.transcript: We were truly a sight to behold!

423332425.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
423332425.transcript: Mind if I danced with your whip?

430102711.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
430102711.transcript: Taking it a little too far, aren't you?

433893591.label: PL0600_vo_CMM_emo_win_2
433893591.transcript: Get an eyeful. It's the last thing you'll see.

447023396.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
447023396.transcript: Of course. You just never caught us in the right light.

449752345.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000
449752345.transcript: Some like it hot, don't they?

456306876.label: PL0600_vo_NAV_get_snp_2
456306876.transcript: Now what were you doing here of all places?

462511384.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
462511384.transcript: Ugh, fighting this hard gives me wrinkles.

463577761.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0100
463577761.transcript: Let's go all out next time, shall we?

464073804.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
464073804.transcript: Next time, let's really show them what we're made of!

489555096.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
489555096.transcript: This is our chance to stop that foul woman!

502673550.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
502673550.transcript: You didn't strain yourself, did you?

509469937.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
509469937.transcript: We've still got a ways to go!

514546526.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
514546526.transcript: Only an astral could manage that.

517046377.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
517046377.transcript: My, what strong shoulders you have.

518029059.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
518029059.transcript: You are a quick little minx.

531405026.label: PL0600_vo_CMM_emo_win_6
531405026.transcript: The most beautiful rose is the deadliest of all.

531792324.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
531792324.transcript: My roses... an enthralling fragrance, wouldn't you say?

534781685.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
534781685.transcript: Like a book, my dear knight. And I enjoyed every word.

534799073.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
534799073.transcript: What can I say? Charm comes naturally to me.

538353745.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_break
538353745.transcript: Let's bring this to a close.

544353970.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
544353970.transcript: Rely on each other, and we will prevail.

545839081.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
545839081.transcript: Let's do this the hard way!

566028982.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_C
566028982.transcript: I see someone wants me to get rough.

569455894.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_1
569455894.transcript: Every rose has her thorns after all.

580187000.label: PL0600_vo_ETC_pic_line_2
580187000.transcript: You go right into my pocket.

586104003.label: PL0600_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_C
586104003.transcript: So discretion's the name of the game, then!

594360706.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
594360706.transcript: You certainly gave them a run for their money.

601685376.label: PL0600_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_3
601685376.transcript: Aww, you were worried about me.

602943129.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0000
602943129.transcript: I could say the same for you, Lyria.

615153521.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
615153521.transcript: I love to watch you work.

616054497.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
616054497.transcript: You rugged old mercs have that certain je ne sais quoi.

617764311.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
617764311.transcript: I could do far, far worse.

619287294.label: PL0600_vo_CMM_emo_pose_2
619287294.transcript: Let me take care of you.

627318360.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
627318360.transcript: Oh, how cute. You think I need protection.

633569474.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_3
633569474.transcript: What can I say? I'm experienced.

634677880.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
634677880.transcript: Pardon us, we're only trying to save the world here.

645223048.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
645223048.transcript: But you're already such a stoic little lily pad.

659447230.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
659447230.transcript: Not bad. Though I guess we've fought it once before.

662777218.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
662777218.transcript: I must admit, that primal-eating spear of yours frightens me.

665385802.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
665385802.transcript: With you by my side, who could challenge us?

671151281.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
671151281.transcript: The next fight might not be so kind to us.

677980457.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_A
677980457.transcript: It'll take far more to dissuade us!

678952420.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
678952420.transcript: A strapping pair of young women? What's not to love?

680028462.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
680028462.transcript: Forgive us, Skyfarers don't back down.

700636689.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0300
700636689.transcript: Aren't you a strapping young sharpshooter?

704431923.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
704431923.transcript: An unexpected ally, but I'll take it.

705453062.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
705453062.transcript: Sorry to wake you. We'll put you back to sleep soon enough.

705480367.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
705480367.transcript: What will you do to repay me?

709476570.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_2chain
709476570.transcript: Next time you take the lead.

713095493.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
713095493.transcript: Perhaps we went a little too far.

725063054.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
725063054.transcript: I bet you could split a mountain if you tried.

736425446.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
736425446.transcript: Phantoms, primals, and mortals, oh my! What a pack we make!

737581503.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
737581503.transcript: You're hardly an obstacle for us.

739297348.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
739297348.transcript: Well, I've never met a boat I didn't like to rock!

747230077.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_C
747230077.transcript: Would you care to leave us alone?

752497074.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
752497074.transcript: Roses bloom in your full glory!

758197336.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
758197336.transcript: They do say beauty is a most lethal weapon.

759160802.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
759160802.transcript: Grass is always greener. I can't aim a firearm to save my life.

762521455.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
762521455.transcript: A little sweat never hurt anyone.

765533123.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0100
765533123.transcript: We can always count on you, can't we?

766002447.label: PL0600_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_C
766002447.transcript: Well, it seems we'll have to do this the hard way.

787859350.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
787859350.transcript: We've been through worse. Press on!

792552444.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
792552444.transcript: What do you mean? That was me being nice.

801548579.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
801548579.transcript: Beauty is strength. You would do well to remember that.

802869573.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
802869573.transcript: I grow tired of your games.

811993575.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
811993575.transcript: Anything for a member of the crew.

815400509.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
815400509.transcript: You're in top form today, Catalina.

819258586.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
819258586.transcript: I have that effect on mortals.

825108808.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
825108808.transcript: I pity you. You think you can win.

835814752.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
835814752.transcript: A god stands before us, but we won't back down!

845471829.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
845471829.transcript: My kingdom of thorns for a decent foe.

850079409.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
850079409.transcript: Does this beard move on its own or what?

857950406.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
857950406.transcript: I'll pierce through her with all that I am!

866475172.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
866475172.transcript: Who knows what dangers lurk ahead? Proceed carefully.

870953380.label: PL0600_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_3
870953380.transcript: I still got life in me!

871374808.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
871374808.transcript: I can get behind that philosophy.

872383937.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
872383937.transcript: I've heard that a time or two.

875403542.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
875403542.transcript: This poor soul... lost to its own rage.

876414953.label: PL0600_vo_ETC_lift_stay_line_5
876414953.transcript: I feel it in my core.

880944846.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B
880944846.transcript: Oh, how I wish we could keep playing with you.

885147388.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
885147388.transcript: Good, because I wasn't quite satisfied.

897754366.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
897754366.transcript: I would love a luxurious soak in a tub.

898653514.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_A
898653514.transcript: Shall we pick up the pace?

903663546.label: PL0600_vo_DMG_rise_4
903663546.transcript: I hope you're ready for payback.

904386384.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
904386384.transcript: May your metal husk rot and wither.

907555122.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_B
907555122.transcript: We have the upper hand! Don't lose it!

910999577.label: PL0600_vo_NAV_get_snp_1
910999577.transcript: Oh, you dear creature. I'll take you home.

915141004.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
915141004.transcript: Forgive me. I don't do well with flames.

950698103.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
950698103.transcript: Though I'm no damsel, I love the company of a strapping knight.

954085527.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
954085527.transcript: The rose who blooms only for the right skyfarer... Rosetta!

957083390.label: PL0600_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL1400
957083390.transcript: I almost feel bad for them.

966780777.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
966780777.transcript: All of life's a performance, isn't it?

969666493.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
969666493.transcript: Only if it comes with free massages.

973700150.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
973700150.transcript: Are you truly a primal beast?

981639548.label: PL0600_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL0400_3
981639548.transcript: I'm stronger than ever, thanks to you!

1002055563.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
1002055563.transcript: Stay strong, everyone! One final push!

1007484780.label: PL0600_vo_CMM_emo_pose_3
1007484780.transcript: I'll show you how it's done.

1013336706.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
1013336706.transcript: You shall not approach this woman!

1019075018.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_2
1019075018.transcript: And here I could go all day long.

1027530880.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
1027530880.transcript: This rose shall be your slumber.

1035073717.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
1035073717.transcript: Will you entertain me again, sir knight?

1045286395.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
1045286395.transcript: I'll go as many rounds as you like.

1064845194.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
1064845194.transcript: You will let us pass, one way or another.

1069038122.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
1069038122.transcript: We have a sky realm to save. I do hope you understand.

8694018.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
8694018.transcript: May I call you Mister Dependable?

18853742.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
18853742.transcript: Butterflies and flowers are natural partners.

54949574.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
54949574.transcript: Let's continue this graceful dance together.

102583297.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
102583297.transcript: You're a dear for watching over us.

121185553.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
121185553.transcript: Quite the standard to live up to, but I'll try anyway.

134261165.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
134261165.transcript: You're a vibrant bud amid all this destruction.

158172681.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
158172681.transcript: You flatter me, dear, but I'm no god. Just a friend.

169629758.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
169629758.transcript: Sink into my bed of roses!

198027125.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
198027125.transcript: Oh, sweetie, I could ask the same of you.

212035750.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
212035750.transcript: You are the bee to my rose.

221244346.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
221244346.transcript: It's every queen's dream to dance with a hero.

235228376.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
235228376.transcript: Of course. Just keep your distance when the sparks start to fly.

243256855.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
243256855.transcript: Is there no limit to what sky-dwellers can achieve?

261297179.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
261297179.transcript: It's only right we end things with a flourish!

265336161.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
265336161.transcript: You are the thorn to my rose.

316994967.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
316994967.transcript: To be honest, the darkness you wield feels strangely kind.

322769537.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2100
322769537.transcript: Petals from the rose, feathers from an angel. Gorgeous.

325438914.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
325438914.transcript: Cliche as it may be, you DO resemble the Grim Reaper, Vaseraga.

400040539.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
400040539.transcript: It's because they fade that they're beautiful.

405742976.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
405742976.transcript: There are none livelier. That's for sure.

432404004.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
432404004.transcript: When that future arrives, I'll bring flowers to celebrate.

449961901.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
449961901.transcript: Oops. Have I bewitched you too?

451949284.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
451949284.transcript: Do you enjoy my support, Eagle Eyes?

452443682.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
452443682.transcript: Fly us to greatness, Mr. Helmsman!

484760456.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
484760456.transcript: Who am I to refuse a wedge of the skies?

488992069.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
488992069.transcript: You're surprisingly sweet... for someone who has the air of a villain.

539597429.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
539597429.transcript: Oh, this is surprising. Who taught you about aromas?

547958910.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
547958910.transcript: Roses are red, your sword is blue. Hand in hand we support the crew.

564411028.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2600
564411028.transcript: Your power is in full bloom!

589458114.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
589458114.transcript: My thorns aren't even the most dangerous thing about me.

633452090.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
633452090.transcript: You serve your lady well, sir knight.

637471546.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
637471546.transcript: I'm glad you appreciate my mystique.

640748671.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
640748671.transcript: Seeking power is fine, but not at the expense of your health.

648969243.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
648969243.transcript: Thank you. I should grow some blue ones for you.

651209437.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
651209437.transcript: It's all yours. But don't push yourself, okay?

656448387.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
656448387.transcript: Oh, cute that you worry about me.

661510897.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
661510897.transcript: Here I thought my briars would swallow you whole.

665583191.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
665583191.transcript: A bullet to bring pain, and a rose to bring solace. It's poetic.

682457575.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
682457575.transcript: I was once made to conquer this realm. Now I fight alongside its very pillars.

707826030.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
707826030.transcript: Everything we do, we do with elegance.

743021890.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
743021890.transcript: I suppose our collaboration did bear fruit.

781840379.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
781840379.transcript: It's as if your swords are alive and they know which role to play.

788571675.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
788571675.transcript: Your swords are radiant. I could get lost in their splendor.

828558104.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
828558104.transcript: Beauty is often enhanced by mystery.

834235467.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
834235467.transcript: Thank you. That was too close.

837283825.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
837283825.transcript: Oh dear. You really thought that was funny.

840538875.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
840538875.transcript: Dear, we've only begun to blossom.

841592592.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
841592592.transcript: Like a sea of shooting stars!

842659409.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0100
842659409.transcript: Don't let me down now, Captain!

847123418.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
847123418.transcript: Succumb to the aroma of my roses!

857161705.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
857161705.transcript: Don't rush it, dear. Recklessness is murder on the skin.

879158032.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
879158032.transcript: We must press harder! For those we love!

894514943.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
894514943.transcript: Flowers communicate more than words ever could.

895296017.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
895296017.transcript: The loveliest rose blooms in the brightest light.

901973995.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
901973995.transcript: Draw my ire and you'll find out what it's like.

906408156.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600
906408156.transcript: Yes! And I was blown away!

945775200.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0800
945775200.transcript: Sometimes that's all that needs to be said.

961185363.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
961185363.transcript: Your flames are beautiful, if not devilish.

974346345.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
974346345.transcript: With my petals and your blades, we put on a lovely show!

981025237.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
981025237.transcript: May our sweet bouquet ease your pain.

984914335.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
984914335.transcript: I'll tolerate your flame, so long as it leads us to victory.

994679752.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
994679752.transcript: Now, now. Not until you've had your vegetables first.

995342919.label: PL0600_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0200
995342919.transcript: Quite the artful execution, my dear.

1040584884.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
1040584884.transcript: What are friends for? You're very welcome.

236618205.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
236618205.transcript: I love a man with some mystery.

330970452.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
330970452.transcript: Tell me, dear, how do you manage that accuracy of yours?

346059166.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
346059166.transcript: Powerful and gorgeous. You're an inspiration.

402571767.label: PL0600_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
402571767.transcript: Sorry. You want me to do what now?

536291417.label: PL0600_vo_CMM_emo_squat_2
536291417.transcript: Oh my... That sounds too physical.

540474345.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
540474345.transcript: I love a woman who always hits her mark.

637290167.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
637290167.transcript: I was thinking the same about you.

687227121.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
687227121.transcript: I'm used to taking the lead.

803009454.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
803009454.transcript: For such a beautiful sparrow to notice a humble flower, I'm honored.

916568883.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
916568883.transcript: Oh dear. When are you going to reveal your true strength?

975331913.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
975331913.transcript: What can I say? Every lady has her secrets.

1065456686.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
1065456686.transcript: Ah, but with an eternal on our side, there's no thicket we cannot clear.

211399650.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
211399650.transcript: Oh, the Supreme Primark knows how to tussle.

276047813.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
276047813.transcript: Thank you. Those wings of yours aren't half bad either.

511028408.label: PL0600_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_1
511028408.transcript: Like this? I'm not so sure.

571881542.label: PL0600_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
571881542.transcript: What beautiful wings. I could stare at them all day.

1016533708.label: PL0600_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_3
1016533708.transcript: I'm a lover, not a fighter.
